content:
Architectural nursing home design software: digitalization design of nursing home spaces

Nursing homes are an important professional field of architectural design. From nursing home space design to elderly facility configuration, from None barrier design to secure analysis, nursing home design software helps designers create high-quality nursing homes. This article will comprehensively evaluate mainstream architectural nursing home design software to help nursing home architects master the digitalization design tools of nursing homes.

Nursing homes Corevalue of design software

Nursing home design software plays key functions in architectural design:

  • Retirement space: overall space design of nursing home
  • Elderly facilities: configuration of elderly facilities and equipment
  • None barrier design: None barrier access design
  • secure analysis: secure analysis for the elderly
  • Standard check: nursing home building code check

In-depth Review: Mainstream nursing home design software

Revit Senior: BIM nursing home design tool

Revit Senior is a nursing facility design method for the Revit platform.

Core Features:

  • BIM nursing home modeling
  • Retirement space family library
  • None barrier design function
  • Elderly facility family library
  • Automatic generation of construction drawings

BIMadvantages:

Revit Senior's Coreadvantages is BIMintegration. Nursing home design is integrated into the BIM model, and design and construction are seamlessly connected.

None barrier design:

RevitSupportedNone barrier design is parametric, and the passage space design is efficient.

Senior Living Designer: a professional tool for senior care design

Senior Living Designer is a professional software for nursing home design.

Core Features:

  • Nursing home space design
  • Living unit layout
  • None barrier access design
  • secure analysis function
  • Standard checking function

Senior Living Professional:

Senior Living Designer's Corevantages is specialized in nursing homes. The software is specifically oriented to the design needs of nursing homes, and its functions fit the nursing home design process.

Secure analysis:

The software supports secure analysis for the elderly to ensure secure nursing homes.

Elder Care Tool: Elderly facility design tool

Elder Care Tool is a professional software for elderly facility design.

Core Features:

  • Modeling of elderly facilities
  • Living space design
  • Public activity areas
  • None barrier design
  • Program visualization

Geriatric specialty:

Elder Care Tool's Coreadvantages is specialized in the elderly. The software can accurately design each functional space of elderly facilities.

Residential design:

The software supports the special design of the elderly's living space.

Nursing home design software Comparison Table

It can automatically generate space plans according to the needs of the elderly and optimize the traffic layout.

BIM nursing care deepens

The nursing home design will be deeply integrated into BIM collaboration. The nursing home model is integrated into the building BIM project, and the design and construction are seamlessly connected.

Intelligent nursing home design

The intelligent nursing home design function will be further improved. .Designers can integrate intelligent elderly care systems to achieve nursing home intelligence.

Secure design deepening

Secure design function for the elderly will be more improved. Designers can comprehensively analyze the security needs of the elderly and optimizesecur e design.

Purchasing suggestions

When choosing nursing home design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Retirement type: nursing homes, nursing homes, and senior apartments have different needs
  • None barrier requirements: None barrier design requires professional None barrier tools
  • BIMapplications: BIM projects are suitable for Revit Senior
  • Secure requirements: Secure design requires secure analysis function
  • Budget considerations: Evaluate software costs and training investment

Nursing home design software is a digitalization design tool for senior care spaces. Choose the appropriate nursing home design software to create high-quality senior care spaces.
